query:
SELECT bookTitle, authorName, 
  LEFT(coverImageUrl, 80) as coverUrl,
  LEFT(s3CoverUrl, 60) as s3Url
FROM book_profiles
WHERE coverImageUrl IS NULL 
   OR coverImageUrl = ''
   OR coverImageUrl = 'not-found'
   OR s3CoverUrl IS NULL
   OR s3CoverUrl = ''
ORDER BY bookTitle;

  LEFT(s3CoverUrl, 60) as s3Url

   OR coverImageUrl = 'not-found'
   OR s3CoverUrl IS NULL
